across gaming and enterprise domains. Currently a Senior Solution Engineer, I specialize in React, Next.js, and modern frontend architecture. Beyond coding, I mentor developers and collaborate closely with stakeholders to deliver real business impact.

skills.title: The Stack of Choice
skills.blurb: A modern and robust tech stack curated for performance, developer experience, and scalability.

items.title: Senior Solution Engineer
points: Leading end-to-end delivery of multiple production-grade applications, coordinating across frontend, backend, and QA teams
Owning frontend architecture using Next.js (App Router), React, and Redux, ensuring scalability and maintainability
Driving client discussions, requirement analysis, and feature planning for ongoing projects
Mentoring junior developers and improving team productivity and code quality

items.title: Solution Engineer
points: Developed and scaled casino and betting platforms using React, Next.js, Redux, Tailwind, and Material UI
Implemented real-time features using WebSockets, enabling dynamic updates and improved user engagement
Built and optimized admin backoffice systems, improving operational workflows and reducing manual effort
Enhanced SEO and performance using SSR (Next.js), improving page load times and discoverability

items.title: Full Stack Developer
points: Developed frontend for an Enterprise Chatbot using React and Microsoft Bot Framework (DirectLine)
Implemented features like speech-to-text and text-to-speech, improving accessibility and UX
Led a team of 7 frontend developers, ensuring timely delivery and quality standards
Designed and developed a secure admin dashboard, improving user management and system control

items.title: Stickyshop
descriptionParagraphs: Built a full-stack eCommerce platform with product listing, cart management, and user profiles.
Implemented scalable architecture using Next.js, Express, and PostgreSQL, with optimized data fetching via TanStack Query.
Leveraged AI-assisted tools for UI ideation and development acceleration while maintaining full ownership of architecture and business logic.
highlights: Next.js storefront, Vite admin, Express API, and PostgreSQL monorepo
Shop filters, cart, checkout with Razorpay and server-authoritative totals
Email verification, transactional mail, and Razorpay webhooks
Admin RBAC with coupons, shipping methods, and tax rules
S3-compatible uploads, verified-purchase reviews, Docker Compose for local dev

items.title: Interview Prep — AI mock interviews with Gemini
descriptionParagraphs: Timed mock interviews powered by Google Gemini, with optional resume-aware questions, voice (TTS + speech input), and saved sessions.

Full-stack Next.js app where signed-in users configure realistic mock interviews (domain, type, technical focus, duration). Gemini drives the conversation—opening questions, follow-ups from the live transcript, and a structured end-of-session evaluation—optionally grounded in an uploaded or pasted resume and target role.
Includes a fullscreen interview room, browser text-to-speech and speech-to-text, and exportable Q&A history backed by Prisma and Google sign-in.

How it uses AI: the model generates the first question and each follow-up from the running transcript, time remaining, session focus (stack/track), and tailored resume context, returning structured JSON for each turn. A dedicated API lightly polishes speech-to-text transcripts without inventing facts. After the session, it produces a verdict-style summary with strengths, weaknesses, and recommendations from the full Q&A.
Stack for recruiters: Next.js App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind v4, Auth.js, Prisma (SQLite locally; PostgreSQL-ready), @google/generative-ai, pdf-parse.
highlights: Wizard for Web / SAP / IT services tracks; Technical, HR, and Behavioral interviews; configurable session length (15–60 min).
Tailored mode: server-side PDF text extraction and prompts that include resume plus optional company and role context.
Server-only Gemini integration with JSON-shaped interview turns and evaluation; model fallback chain for reliability.
Voice UX: TTS for questions, optional mic input, and debounced AI polish of STT text so answers stay accurate and readable.
Auth.js + Google OAuth; sessions and turns persisted per user; review page with copy and download.
